description_long: This is a tall, narrow metal trolley with four wire mesh shelves, designed for storage or transport of items in urban environments such as shops, sidewalks, or garages. The frame is constructed from tubular metal bars, providing structural support and durability, while the shelves are made of closely spaced metal wires to allow airflow and prevent dust accumulation. The trolley is equipped with four small caster wheels at the base, enabling easy movement across flat surfaces. At the top, there is a single horizontal handlebar for pushing or pulling the trolley, and the open design on the sides and front allows for easy access to the shelves. The finish is a dark, likely powder-coated metal, giving it a sleek and utilitarian appearance. One side features a small rectangular sign or label holder, possibly for branding or identification purposes.
description: A tall, narrow metal trolley with four wire mesh shelves, a single top handlebar, and four caster wheels for mobility. The trolley has a dark finish and an open, accessible design with a small sign holder on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open wire mesh shelves and the tubular frame, with the handlebar visible at the top.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the handlebar and the small rectangular sign holder attached to the upper shelf.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the wire mesh shelves and the supporting frame structure.
description_view_3: Rear view with the sign holder more prominently visible, showing the trolley's handlebar and shelf arrangement.
attribute_handle_type: single bar handle, tubular metal, horizontal, non-ergonomic, fixed at the top rear of the trolley
attribute_wheel_arrangement: four wheels, one at each corner of the base, likely all swivel casters
attribute_branding_or_signage: small rectangular sign holder on the upper rear side, white with some markings
